title: Multi-budget plan merge into single project
prerequisites:
1. User is authorized as Document Staff
2. At least 3 available budget plans exist for a unit
testData: Select 3 available budget plans
steps:
1. Login as Document Staff
2. Navigate to Import Project Page and open manual creation form
3. Select the 3 available budget plans from the multi-select list
4. Complete the rest of the project details and click Submit ("ยืนยัน")
expectedResult: A single project is created. The budget field equals the sum of the 3 plans. The selected plans are linked to the project and become unavailable for other projects.

title: Urgency warning acknowledgement before project save
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Expected delivery date below standard timeline for the selected method
steps:
1. Login as Document Staff
2. Navigate to Import Project Page and open manual creation form
3. Fill in data with a very early delivery date
4. Click Submit ("ยืนยัน")
5. When the warning modal appears, click Cancel ("ยกเลิก") or close it
expectedResult: The project save is blocked. The project is only created after explicitly clicking Confirm ("ยืนยันและสร้างโครงการ") inside the warning modal.

title: Urgency calculation with public holiday crossings
prerequisites:
1. User is authorized as Document Staff
2. System has configured Thai public holidays
testData: Delivery date exactly 5 working days away, but crosses 2 weekend days and 1 public holiday
steps:
1. Login as Document Staff
2. Navigate to Import Project Page and open manual creation form
3. Set the delivery date as described
4. Click Submit ("ยืนยัน")
expectedResult: The system accurately counts only 5 working days (excluding weekends and the holiday) and triggers the urgency warning modal if it falls below the standard threshold.

title: Duplicate-submit prevention on project creation
prerequisites:
1. User is authorized as Document Staff
2. Simulate very slow network condition
testData: Valid manual form data
steps:
1. Login as Document Staff
2. Navigate to Import Project Page and open manual creation form
3. Fill out the form
4. Double-click the Submit ("ยืนยัน") button rapidly (simulating slow network)
expectedResult: The submit button is immediately disabled after the first click, and only exactly one project is created in the system without duplicate submissions.

title: Excel bulk import partial failure transactional rollback
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Document Staff
testData: Bulk Excel file with 5 rows: Rows 1-4 are valid; Row 5 has missing required data (e.g., missing title)
steps:
1. Login as Document Staff
2. Navigate to Import Project Page
3. Upload the Bulk Excel file with 5 rows
4. Click the submit button
expectedResult: Rows 1-4 are successfully imported into the system. Row 5 is discarded and not imported. No error message is shown on the UI for the failed row.

title: Main table columns
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
steps: 1. Navigate to All Projects Page ("หน้ารวมโครงการ")
expectedResult: The table correctly displays the following columns: "เลขที่ลงรับ", "โครงการ", "ผู้รับผิดชอบ", "วิธีการจัดหา", "สถานะ", and a three dots action button

title: Procurement role sees all departments
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Procurement Staff
steps:
1. Login as user `procurement1` with password `procurement1` (Role: Procurement1)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
expectedResult: Projects from all departments are visible in the table

title: External user sees own department only
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an External or Department Staff (not procurement)
steps:
1. Login as External/Department Staff
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
expectedResult: Only projects belonging to the user's own department are visible in the table

title: Default 6-month view
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
steps: 1. Navigate to All Projects Page
expectedResult: The table defaults to displaying projects created within the last 6 months

title: Default sort
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
steps: 1. Navigate to All Projects Page without applying any sort parameters
expectedResult: The table results are sorted by the latest "เลขที่ลงรับ" (Receive Number) descending by default

title: Procurement summary cards
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Procurement Staff
steps:
1. Login as user `procurement1` with password `procurement1` (Role: Procurement1)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
expectedResult: The summary cards displayed at the top include: "ทั้งหมด", "ยังไม่มอบหมาย", "รอการตอบรับ", "กำลังดำเนินการ", "ปิดโครงการ", "ยกเลิก", "ด่วน"

title: External summary cards
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as External/Department Staff
steps:
1. Login as External/Department Staff
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
expectedResult: The summary cards displayed at the top include: "ทั้งหมด", "ยังไม่เริ่ม", "กำลังดำเนินการ", "ปิดโครงการ", "ยกเลิก", "ด่วน"

title: Combined urgent summary count
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: System contains projects with statuses URGENT, VERY_URGENT, and SUPER_URGENT
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Inspect the "ด่วน" (Urgent) summary card count
expectedResult: The count correctly aggregates all projects with URGENT, VERY_URGENT, and SUPER_URGENT statuses together

title: Quick search by receive no
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Search term matches an existing "เลขที่ลงรับ"
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Enter the receive number in the quick search box
expectedResult: The table filters and returns only projects matching the exact receive number

title: Quick search by title
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Search term matches an existing project title
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Enter the project title in the quick search box
expectedResult: The table filters and returns projects matching the project title

title: Quick search by assignee
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Search term matches an existing assignee name
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Enter the assignee's name in the quick search box
expectedResult: The table filters and returns projects assigned to the matching user

title: Advanced title filter
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Search term for "ชื่อโครงการ"
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Enter project title and click apply
expectedResult: The backend request uses the title parameter and the table shows partial matches for the project title

title: Date range filter
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Specific start and end dates
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Select a date range and click apply
expectedResult: The table filters correctly by the "created_at" date range

title: Fiscal year filter uses Buddhist year
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Select fiscal year "2566", "2567", or "2568"
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Select a fiscal year and click apply
expectedResult: The frontend sends the Buddhist year value, and the backend filters the "เลขที่ลงรับ" prefix to match the Buddhist year

title: Procurement type filter
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Select one or more procurement methods (e.g. e-bidding)
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Select specific procurement types and click apply
expectedResult: The table filters and displays only projects with the exact selected procurement types

title: Procurement status filter options
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Procurement Staff
steps:
1. Login as user `procurement1` with password `procurement1` (Role: Procurement1)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Expand the status filter options
expectedResult: The status options include: "ยังไม่ได้มอบหมาย", "รอการตอบรับ", "กำลังจัดซื้อ / กำลังบริหารสัญญา", "รออนุมัติยกเลิก", "ยกเลิก", "ปิดโครงการแล้ว", "การเงินส่งคืนแก้ไข"

title: External status filter mapping
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as External Staff
steps:
1. Login as user `registration_staff` with password `registration_staff` (Role: Guest)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Apply status filters
expectedResult: "ยังไม่เริ่ม" maps to UNASSIGNED and WAITING_ACCEPT; "กำลังดำเนินการ" maps to IN_PROGRESS, WAITING_CANCEL, and REQUEST_EDIT; "ปิดโครงการ" maps to CLOSED; "ยกเลิก" maps to CANCELLED

title: Urgent status filter
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Select urgency levels
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Open advanced filters
3. Select urgent status values and apply
expectedResult: The table accurately filters projects matching exact URGENT, VERY_URGENT, and SUPER_URGENT statuses

title: Assignee filter
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Select a specific user
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Open advanced filters
3. Select an assignee from the filter and apply
expectedResult: The table returns projects where the selected user exists as either a procurement or contract assignee

title: Department filter for procurement
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Procurement Staff
steps:
1. Login as user `procurement1` with password `procurement1` (Role: Procurement1)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Open advanced filters
expectedResult: The Department filter is visible and allows filtering projects by selected departments

title: External hides department filter
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as External Staff
steps:
1. Login as user `registration_staff` with password `registration_staff` (Role: Guest)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Open advanced filters
expectedResult: The Department filter is completely hidden, and any department query parameters are ignored/cleared

title: Sort controls
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Click on a sortable column header (e.g., "วิธีการจัดหา")
expectedResult: The frontend sends the correct `sortBy` and `sortOrder` parameters, and the table updates accordingly

title: Clear filters
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Apply any combination of filters
3. Click the "ล้างค่าตัวกรอง" button
expectedResult: The table view will return to the default state where you can see projects within latest 6 months prior and receive number is sorted from latest always

title: View status labels
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Observe rows in the table matching statuses like "รอการตอบรับ", "ยังไม่ได้มอบหมาย", "รออนุมัติยกเลิก", etc.
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Observe the "สถานะ" column for different projects
expectedResult: The column correctly displays the Thai status labels (e.g., "ยังไม่ได้มอบหมาย", "รอการตอบรับ", "กำลังจัดซื้อ", "กำลังบริหารสัญญา", "รออนุมัติยกเลิก", "ยกเลิก", "ปิดโครงการแล้ว", "การเงินส่งคืนแก้ไข")

title: Dynamic responsible name: procurement
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Project: "User Testing - Network monitoring sensors"
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Look at the "ผู้รับผิดชอบ" column for the project
expectedResult: The column displays the names of the procurement assignees

title: Dynamic responsible name: contract
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized and logged in
testData: Project: "User Testing - Security service contract"
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Look at the "ผู้รับผิดชอบ" column for the project
expectedResult: The column displays the names of the contract assignees

title: Original assignee can add assignee
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as the original assignee of a project
testData: Project: "User Testing - Network monitoring sensors" (Status: IN_PROGRESS)
steps:
1. Login as user `procurement1` with password `procurement1` (Role: Procurement1)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Click the three dots menu on the target project
expectedResult: The "เพิ่มผู้รับผิดชอบ" (Add Assignee) action is available in the menu

title: Procurement head can add assignee
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as the Procurement Head
testData: Project: "User Testing - Network monitoring sensors" (Status: IN_PROGRESS)
steps:
1. Login as user `proc_head1` with password `proc_head1` (Role: Procurement Head1)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Click the three dots menu on the target project
expectedResult: The "เพิ่มผู้รับผิดชอบ" (Add Assignee) action is available in the menu

title: Admin can add assignee
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Admin
testData: Project: "User Testing - Network monitoring sensors" (Status: IN_PROGRESS)
steps:
1. Login as user `super_admin` with password `super_admin` (Role: Super Admin)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Click the three dots menu on the target project
expectedResult: The "เพิ่มผู้รับผิดชอบ" (Add Assignee) action is available in the menu

title: Add assignee same workgroup only
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an eligible assignee (e.g., Original Assignee)
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Click the three dots menu and select "เพิ่มผู้รับผิดชอบ"
3. Search for users in the dialog
expectedResult: Selectable users are strictly limited to the project's workgroup, and the backend rejects invalid users

title: Add assignee only IN_PROGRESS
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an eligible assignee
testData: Projects like "User Testing - New chairs for reading room", "User Testing - Completed tablet procurement"
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Click the three dots menu on non-IN_PROGRESS projects
expectedResult: The "เพิ่มผู้รับผิดชอบ" action is hidden or disabled for all statuses other than IN_PROGRESS

title: Original assignee can return project
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as the Original Assignee
testData: Project: "User Testing - Network monitoring sensors"
steps:
1. Login as user `procurement1` with password `procurement1` (Role: Procurement1)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Click the three dots menu and select the return action
4. Confirm the return
expectedResult: The project successfully returns to the pool, its status becomes UNASSIGNED, and all active assignees are cleared

title: Non-original assignee/head cannot return
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as an added Assignee or the Workgroup Head
testData: Project: "User Testing - Network monitoring sensors"
steps:
1. Login as user `procurement2` with password `procurement2` (Role: Procurement2) or Procurement Head
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Click the three dots menu on the target project
expectedResult: The return action is hidden from the UI, and direct API calls are rejected

title: Return hidden when not eligible
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as the Original Assignee
testData: Project: "User Testing - Accounting software renewal"
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Click the three dots menu on the target project
expectedResult: The return action is hidden or disabled from the UI, and direct API calls are rejected

title: Cancel disabled statuses
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized
testData: Projects like "User Testing - Completed tablet procurement", "User Testing - Cancelled printer repair"
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Click the three dots menu on these projects
expectedResult: The cancel ("ขอยกเลิกโครงการ" / "ยกเลิกโครงการ") action is hidden or disabled, and direct API calls are rejected

title: Cancel reason required
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized
testData: Project: "User Testing - Data center UPS upgrade"
steps:
1. Navigate to All Projects Page
2. Open the cancel dialog
3. Leave the "ระบุเหตุผลในการยกเลิก" text area empty or fill with whitespace
expectedResult: Confirmed button is disabled

title: Staff cancel request
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Procurement Staff
testData: Project: "User Testing - Data center UPS upgrade" with reason "Duplicate plan"
steps:
1. Login as user `procurement1` with password `procurement1` (Role: Procurement1)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Open cancel dialog for a project
4. Enter a reason and submit
expectedResult: The cancellation request is submitted, and the project status changes to WAITING_CANCEL

title: Head direct cancel
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Procurement Head
testData: Project: "User Testing - Data center UPS upgrade" with reason "Duplicate plan"
steps:
1. Login as user `proc_head1` with password `proc_head1` (Role: Procurement Head1)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Open cancel dialog for a project
4. Enter a reason and submit
expectedResult: The project is cancelled directly, its status becomes CANCELLED without requiring further approval

title: Cancellation approval/rejection
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized as Procurement Head
testData: Project: "User Testing - Air purifier order"
steps:
1. Login as user `proc_head1` with password `proc_head1` (Role: Procurement Head1)
2. Navigate to All Projects Page
3. Approve or Reject the WAITING_CANCEL request
expectedResult: Approving changes the project status to CANCELLED; Rejecting restores the project to its previous valid status

title: Basic audit: assignee change
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized
steps:
1. Perform the "เพิ่มผู้รับผิดชอบ" (Add Assignee) action on a project
2. Inspect the audit logs/history for the project
expectedResult: The audit log correctly records the actor, the old/new assignee states, the project, and the timestamp

title: Basic audit: return
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized
steps:
1. Perform a project return action
2. Inspect the audit logs/history for the project
expectedResult: The audit log correctly records the actor, the status and assignee change, the project, and the timestamp

title: Basic audit: cancellation
prerequisites: 1. User is authorized
steps:
1. Perform a cancellation request, approval, and/or rejection
2. Inspect the audit logs/history for the project
expectedResult: The cancellation history correctly records the requester, reason, and approver/result (where applicable)

title: Loading and error states
prerequisites: 1. User is accessing All Projects Page
steps: 1. Simulate network loading delay and API failure while fetching the project list or summary cards
expectedResult: A loading indicator appears during fetch, and a retryable error state/UI is displayed upon failure
